plan.failureSummary: The deterministic page.ai run failed because the survey form fields have changed dynamically. The cached steps expected 'Your Name', 'Contact Email', and a 'Select your occupation' combobox, but the page currently displays 'Last Name', 'Email Address', and an 'Age Group' radio button group.
observedIndicators: The current page contains 'Age Group' radio buttons instead of the expected 'Select your occupation' combobox.
Deterministic run mode was active and failed during a cached tool call.
Comparing the failure screenshot with the cached actions shows that the form fields changed dynamically.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and retry the test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Page AI cache to force page.ai to re-evaluate the DOM and dynamically adapt to the currently displayed form fields.

plan.notes: The test page 'unstable-survey' has dynamic form fields that vary between runs. Because the test ran in DETERMINISTIC mode, it attempted to use cached selectors for a combobox ('Select your occupation') that does not exist in the current form structure ('Age Group' radio buttons). Clearing the cache will allow page.ai to autonomously adapt to the current form layout.
